full_text:
Dong Xun (Wen’ao) 董尋 (文奧)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong Xun (董尋), styledWen’ao (文奧), was born in Hedong commandery. Protested against Cao Rui’s palace building and was demoted. Dong Xun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
